title: Moosend vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Moosend vs Constant Contact: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
h1: Moosend vs Constant Contact: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Moosend and Constant Contact comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Moosend is built for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while Constant Contact targets nonprofits and local businesses. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small Businesses Wanting Unlimited Emails At Low Cost

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on nonprofits and local businesses

faq.q: Is Moosend better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Moosend wins for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while Constant Contact is stronger for nonprofits and local businesses. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Moosend starts at a lower price point ($9/mo vs $12/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Constant Contact to Moosend is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
